statusDetail: Fully agentic false-positive / product guard. Re-running the same evidence-gathering against the genuinely-fixed live playground/ (served at :8080, default mode). The model confirmed every seeded condition is now satisfied, so it reports none of the nine ground-truth findings. The fixture's ?mode=fixed run gives the same result for the six CSS scenarios.

page.notes: The live playground/ is correct by default: each scenario ships its Modern Web Guidance technique in its default stylesheet (light-dark(), prefers-reduced-motion gate, fluid max-width, :focus-visible + WCAG-contrast buttons, reserved min-height, @container) and index.html carries a color-scheme meta, a meta description, and a favicon.

evidenceUsed: computed-styles probe (evaluate) under prefers-color-scheme: dark and prefers-reduced-motion: reduce
axe-core (injected via the evaluate primitive, color-contrast)

conditions: component reused at two container widths

eval.subject: playground/ (the genuinely-fixed live playground)

verifiedConditions.fixed-layout: no horizontal overflow at the 360px viewport (0px; the shell grid collapses to a single column under 640px)
verifiedConditions.poor-focus: focused button computed outline-style = solid; axe color-contrast violations = 0
verifiedConditions.no-container-queries: card in the narrow container computes flex-direction = column
verifiedConditions.site-wide: meta description present; favicon present (no console 404); Lighthouse a11y/best-practices/seo/perf = 100/100/100/100

eval.note: Zero of the nine ground-truth findings on the live playground. The product guard passes.
